name: MCPWP
author: Mumega
changelog:
2.8.49

  • New: Blueprint Library — wp_list_site_blueprints/wp_deploy_site_blueprint/wp_extract_site_blueprint. Deploy 5 starter site structures (law firm, restaurant, SaaS, real estate, portfolio) or save custom blueprints from your existing site.
  • New: Chat Excellence — multi-model routing (OpenAI GPT-4o mini, Gemini 2.5 Flash, Workers AI), SSE streaming, persistent history per user, Clear button, model indicator.
  • New: Destructive tool confirmation in chat — delete/rollback tools require explicit OK before executing.
  • New: Chat model picker in Settings.

2.8.48

  • New: Dynamic site memory — wp_remember/wp_recall/wp_forget/wp_list_memories. AI decisions and brand rules persist across sessions in structured namespaces.
  • New: Proactive site signals — wp_get_signals surfaces stale content, broken Elementor data, missing featured images, draft accumulation, plugin updates, and SEO issues without being asked.
  • New: Site Signals panel in Control Room with severity indicators and direct edit links.

2.8.47

  • New: White-label mode — agency name, logo, primary color, and chat greeting configurable in WP Admin > Settings.
  • New: [mcpwp_chat] shortcode renders branded floating chat widget on any page or post.
  • New: Elementor chat widget wrapping the shortcode (available in Elementor widget panel).
  • New: Agency custom hostname routing in proxy worker (CNAME ai.agency.com → proxy.mcpwp.net via KV).

2.8.46

  • New: AI action audit log — every write-tool call logged to DB with before/after state snapshots (EU AI Act compliance).
  • New: One-click rollback for post/page updates and Elementor writes in Control Room.
  • New: CSV export of action log for compliance reporting.
  • New: Configurable log retention (default 90 days, daily auto-prune).

2.8.45

  • New: Server-side MCP tool analytics — anonymous tool call data (tool name, success/failure, duration) sent to PostHog when enabled. Opt-in for free tier, opt-out for paid. No site content or PII collected.
  • New: Site support UUID in Settings page.
  • New: PostHog token and host configurable via WP Admin > Integrations.
  • Docs: Privacy section added to readme.txt per WP.org guidelines.

2.8.44

  • New: PostHog analytics integration — configure token via WP Admin > Integrations. Tracks 10 key admin actions (API key copy, connection test, upgrade click, key create/revoke, integration save/remove, tool toggle, client tab switch).
  • Fix: PostHog token no longer hardcoded — removed default public token, must be configured per-site.

2.8.43

  • Fix: wp_set_template_conditions accepts positional array form ["include","singular","product"] — was flattening to include>general.
  • Fix: wp_get_elementor_globals returns both system_typography/custom_typography and system_colors/custom_colors.
  • Fix: wp_upload_media_from_url now exposes filename, title, alt params in tools/list.
  • Fix: Elementor v4 atomic elements skip settings key validation (they use props/styles).
  • Fix: Form widget schema includes button color keys — removes false-positive validator warnings.

2.8.42

  • Fix: Theme handler corrupted entries removed — only Astra, GeneratePress, Kadence remain with accurate settings_type.
  • Fix: Integrations admin page JS handlers now implemented (save/remove/test connection).
  • Fix: version.json download_url corrected (was 404).
  • Polish: Admin UI inline styles extracted to CSS classes.

2.8.41

  • Fix: Scoped API key scope enforcement — submitted scopes now respected with role-based ceiling; non-admin roles capped at read+write.
  • Fix: SEO MCP tool contract — normalized title/description/canonical_url fields, bulk items alias, Google Indexing tools fixed.
  • New: wp_create/get/update_elementor_custom_code — Elementor Pro custom code snippets with location, conditions, and dry_run.

2.8.40

  • Fix: wp_validate_seo_readiness transport deserialize error on large sites — graph query reduced from 500 to 100 posts.
  • Fix: MCP tools/call handles json_encode failure gracefully.
  • Polish: MCPWP admin shell with CSS design tokens, dark product headers, shared card/badge/toggle components; admin assets load by page slug (#342, #344).
  • Assets: Refreshed WordPress.org banner, icon, and screenshots to MCPWP branding (#341).

2.8.38

  • New: wp_update_media — update alt text, title, caption, or description on existing attachments without re-uploading.

2.8.37

  • Fix: PHP fatal in wp_seo_audit_site and wp_validate_seo_readiness — extract_internal_links_from_content() moved to base class.
  • Fix: Disabled tool categories now enforced at execution time, not just discovery.
  • Fix: Elementor custom-code tools hidden from tools/list when Elementor Pro is not installed.

2.8.36

  • Fix: wp_bulk_find_replace operates on decoded element tree to prevent JSON corruption.
  • New: wp_get_kit_css and wp_set_kit_css for Elementor kit global CSS.
